narrative:
Canfield Twp township has 7,402 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
